1.2.0: Stock / materials NPC — Each store can have an NPC to buy fabric and stuffing at prices set in config (fabricPrice, stuffingPrice). Players choose amount (1–100) and pay with cash or bank.
Per-store job — Job is configured per store (no global Job). Each store has enabled, name, minGrade, and optional minBossGrade.

minBossGrade — Only players with grade >= minBossGrade can use the creator (design/create/edit/delete). Everyone with minGrade can use crafting, storage, and stock shop. If minBossGrade is not set, it falls back to minGrade.

Auto-detect — Config options Framework, Inventory, Target, and Notify can be set to 'auto' to auto-detect from started resources (qbx_core, qb-core, es_extended, ox_inventory, qb-inventory, ox_target, qb-target, ox_lib).
Per-store storage size — Storage is no longer global. Each store’s storage has its own slots and maxWeight (e.g. 100 slots, 1000000 maxWeight).
Script optimised for performance and readability.
Fixed bug where when you had ace perms you could not access the admin commands.
1.2.1: Fixed bug where when you had ace perms you could not access the admin commands.
1.3.0: Added AI image detection checker with strict detection defaults.
Fixed bug where you could not open the storage.
Fixed bug where you could not open the stock shop.

1.0.1: Convoy Sync — group radio playback across multiple vehicles. (Fixed not being able to accept invites)
Convoy leader controls play, pause, stop, seek, volume, and track/URL changes.
Convoy members follow leader playback on their own vehicle radio.
1.0.2: UI polish — reduced purple glow on playlist panel & overlay corner clipping fixes.
Fixed issue where music would continue playing at times.
Character display names on convoy invites.
1.0.3: Invite accept/decline still works via on-screen buttons; optional Enter/Esc shortcuts added.
1.0.4: Convoy volume is per vehicle — leader volume no longer overwrites every member’s car.
Convoy members can pause/play locally without affecting the leader or other cars.
Added ability for other members in convoy to pause it then it syncs back up when they unpause.
Leaving a vehicle no longer stops the radio for everyone.
fixed an issue with audio not stopping at times when you would pause it.
Players who walk into range after a song started now hear it.
1.0.5: Added spawn validation music will no longer play until you have fully loaded in and are in range of a vehicle that has music on.
Server convoy resync only runs when the leader is actually playing.
Stability fixes for convoy invite dismiss focus and late-join audible sync.
1.0.6: Re wrote alot of the script
Added version checker
Added support for more languages.
Added language tab to the settings page for people to choose a language of there choice.
Added control tab to the settings to assist people
Added ability to change keybinds for accept and decline on convoy invites.
Added queue system.
Added better engine & door logic (Muffle bass with doors closed & Volume duck when engine off).
Added EQ system.
Added better validation for checking for music playing and area validation.
Fixed issue where when you would skip ahead in a song it would not for other players.
Fixed GetNetworkObject error in f8 console that would appear at times.
Fixed issue where artist name would not show.
Fixed issue where convoy would disband at times.
Fixed issue where the ui would freeze on a rare occasion.
Fixed issue where pressing play all on a playlist would not play all.
Fixed issue where the ui would remain on screen when the resource would get restarted.
Removed error popping up when you would use the radio keybind or command.
Minor optimisation to make the script run smoother.

1.0.1: Fixed issue with tax not correctly adding up.
1.0.2: Fixed issue where crim coins would add up incorrectly.
1.0.3: Added feature where the max ammount you wont be able to go over.
1.0.5: Advanced money wash system with dynamic tax, admin panel, and database-backed washer locations.
1.0.6: Added version checker.
Fixed crash/disconnect refunds — mid-wash dirty money is queued or returned on reconnect.
Payouts save to DB if disconnected before collect.
Queued dirty refunds are granted on player load, not only when visiting a washer.
